title: taraxacum nutans
intro: Taraxacum nutans, also known as the bent dandelion or common dandelion, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family with yellow flowers and a distinctive bent or nodding habit. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum nutans include its ability to support liver and kidney function, lower blood pressure, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
